Anti_Patterns: Do NOT use PyDESeq2 for single-cell data (use Scanpy rank_genes_groups); Do NOT skip gene filtering; Do NOT use raw p-values for DE; Do NOT ignore batch effects
Decision_Rules: IF data_type=single_cell THEN use Scanpy rank_genes_groups; IF data_type=bulk THEN use PyDESeq2; IF replicates<3 THEN warn('insufficient replicates for statistical power'); IF batch_effect detected THEN add batch to design formula; IF n_genes<100 THEN check filtering stringency

Anti_Patterns: Do NOT mix genome builds without liftOver; Do NOT use ClinVar variants >10kb; Do NOT ignore ClinVar review status stars; Do NOT assume GRCh37 coordinates work on GRCh38
Decision_Rules: IF genome=GRCh37 THEN use grch37.rest.ensembl.org; IF variants>1000 THEN use batch processing; IF conflicting_interpretations THEN check star rating and submitter count; IF population_frequency>0.01 in gnomAD THEN likely benign

Anti_Patterns: Do NOT use uncorrected p-values for enrichment; Do NOT enrich with <5 genes; Do NOT use STRING for pathway-only analysis (use KEGG/Reactome); Do NOT ignore gene set size bias
Decision_Rules: IF species=human THEN prefer Reactome; IF species!=human THEN prefer KEGG; IF network_analysis THEN use STRING first; IF DE_gene_count<10 THEN enrichment may be unreliable

Anti_Patterns: Do NOT trust AlphaFold predictions with pLDDT<50; Do NOT use predicted structures for drug docking without validation; Do NOT ignore experimental structures if available
Decision_Rules: IF experimental_structure_exists THEN prefer PDB; IF pLDDT<50 THEN warn('low confidence prediction'); IF drug_discovery THEN validate with experimental data or docking benchmark; IF PAE>30 THEN region may be disordered

Anti_Patterns: Do NOT skip safety assessment for any target; Do NOT rely on single evidence source; Do NOT ignore failed clinical trials; Do NOT assume druggability without tractability data
Decision_Rules: IF target_novel THEN check OpenTargets genetics evidence first; IF drug_already_approved THEN check DrugBank for mechanism; IF safety_concern THEN flag for expert review; IF phase3_trial_exists THEN high confidence

Anti_Patterns: Do NOT use HMDB for non-human metabolites without species check; Do NOT skip NMR/MS validation for identification; Do NOT ignore isomer distinctions; Do NOT conflate relative and absolute quantification
Decision_Rules: IF MS_data THEN use HMDB MS spectra for matching; IF NMR_data THEN use HMDB NMR spectra; IF pathway_analysis THEN cross-reference KEGG; IF identification_level<2 THEN flag as putative

Key_Parameters: peak_fdr<0.01; min_fold_enrichment=5; narrow_peak for TF; broad_peak for histone
Anti_Patterns: Do NOT skip input control for ChIP-seq; Do NOT use MACS2 without checking fragment size; Do NOT ignore replicate concordance; Do NOT skip Tn5 offset for ATAC-seq
Decision_Rules: IF experiment=ChIP-seq AND target=TF THEN use narrow_peak; IF experiment=ChIP-seq AND target=histone THEN use broad_peak; IF experiment=ATAC-seq THEN apply Tn5 offset correction; IF FRiP<0.01 THEN low signal quality

Anti_Patterns: Do NOT use VUS for clinical decisions; Do NOT ignore conflicting interpretations; Do NOT use ClinVar without checking review status; Do NOT skip population frequency filtering
Decision_Rules: IF ACMG=P/LP AND stars>=2 THEN clinical_use; IF VUS THEN research_only; IF conflicting_interpretations THEN manual_curation_required; IF population_frequency>0.01 THEN likely benign regardless of ACMG

Anti_Patterns: Do NOT use single reference gene; Do NOT skip efficiency calibration; Do NOT pool technical replicates with biological replicates; Do NOT use ΔΔCt for non-primer-efficiency-matched assays
Decision_Rules: IF efficiency<90 OR efficiency>110 THEN recalibrate primers; IF Ct>35 THEN consider below detection limit; IF reference_gene_variance>0.5 THEN use geometric mean of multiple references

Anti_Patterns: Do NOT store unanonymized DICOM in analysis directories; Do NOT ignore window/level settings for CT; Do NOT mix slice thicknesses without registration
Decision_Rules: IF CT THEN check Hounsfield unit calibration; IF MRI THEN check sequence type consistency; IF patient_data THEN anonymize before processing
